text: Hi, Usama. I need one more help, and I'm not sure why this is happening. And it was working before. So you see in the same one, the Report two, or even report one, actually, just look at one of them. Report two, the one that you worked on. So this segment is supposed to, first of all, activate the new bulk operation file, and then it's supposed to clear the filters so that this one was working. Now it's not working for some reason. So could you please look into these lines and just make sure that these filters are cleared here. That's the purpose of these lines, right? And that is basically it. I think that there may be a few more things, but let's correct this one first. And then after that, if there is something else, I'll check and let you know. Thank you.
